name: creator-store-fist-visuals
description: Validate all five shop fist tiers use the sanitized recolorable closed-fist mesh, align forward from the wrist, carry tier aura, and survive respawn and punch motion.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') shared.PunchWallVerifyFist=function(expectedTier,expectedStyle,expectAura) local c=game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character local hand=c and (c:FindFirstChild('RightHand') or c:FindFirstChild('Right Arm')) local root=c and c:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart') local g=c and c:FindFirstChild('Equipped Kaiju Gauntlet') local parts,welds,anchored,collidable,unsafe,maxDistance=0,0,0,0,0,0 if g then for _,d in ipairs(g:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA('BasePart') then parts+=1 if d.Anchored then anchored+=1 end if d.CanCollide or d.CanTouch or d.CanQuery then collidable+=1 end if hand then maxDistance=math.max(maxDistance,(d.Position-hand.Position).Magnitude) end elseif d:IsA('WeldConstraint') then welds+=1 elseif d:IsA('Script') or d:IsA('LocalScript') or d:IsA('ModuleScript') or d:IsA('RemoteEvent') or d:IsA('RemoteFunction') then unsafe+=1 end end end local bounds=g and select(1,g:GetBoundingBox()) local localCenter=hand and bounds and hand.CFrame:PointToObjectSpace(bounds.Position) or Vector3.new(99,99,99) local forward=root and hand and bounds and (bounds.Position-hand.Position):Dot(root.CFrame.LookVector) or -99 local visual=g and g:FindFirstChild('Creator Store Fist Visual',true) local shell=g and g:FindFirstChild('Tier Color Shell',true) local hasMesh=false if visual then for _,d in ipairs(visual:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA('SpecialMesh') and d.MeshId~='' then hasMesh=true break end end end local aura=g and g:GetAttribute('TierAura') local auraRate=tonumber(g and g:GetAttribute('AuraRate')) or 0 local grip=g and g:GetAttribute('GripProfile') local valid=g~=nil and visual~=nil and shell~=nil and hasMesh and g:GetAttribute('DetailTexturePreserved')==false and hand~=nil and g:GetAttribute('Tier')==expectedTier and g:GetAttribute('FistStyle')==expectedStyle and g:GetAttribute('SilhouetteFamily')=='ClosedHeroFist' and g:GetAttribute('ShopArtMatchedTier')==expectedTier and (grip=='ArmoredFistWristAligned' or grip=='GoldFistWristAligned') and (g:GetAttribute('AlignmentStandard')=='R15RightHand' or g:GetAttribute('AlignmentStandard')=='R6Wrist') and parts>=3 and welds>=parts and anchored==0 and collidable==0 and unsafe==0 and maxDistance<3.6 and math.abs(localCenter.X)<.35 and forward>.05 and ((expectAura and aura~=nil and auraRate>0) or (not expectAura and aura==nil)) return H:JSONEncode({tier=g and g:GetAttribute('Tier'),style=g and g:GetAttribute('FistStyle'),silhouette=g and g:GetAttribute('SilhouetteFamily'),grip=grip,alignment=g and g:GetAttribute('AlignmentStandard'),parts=parts,welds=welds,anchored=anchored,collidable=collidable,unsafe=unsafe,maxDistance=maxDistance,localX=localCenter.X,forward=forward,mesh=hasMesh,colorShell=shell~=nil,aura=aura or 'none',auraRate=auraRate,valid=valid}) end return 'verifier-ready'
local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local a=g.PunchWallClientAutomation a:Invoke('Punch') task.wait(.8) return shared.PunchWallVerifyFist(5,'Titan',true)

steps.label: titan remains attached after respawn and punch
